headings.strategy: Tech-forward yet premium. Use tracking-tight for all H1/H2.

telugu_support.strategy: Wrap all Telugu text blocks or elements in a container with a 'lang="te"' attribute. Telugu text naturally expands by 20-30%, so use generous padding and avoid fixed heights. Increase line-height to 1.6 or 1.7 for Telugu.

primary.name: Institutional Navy
primary.usage: Headers, Footers, Primary CTAs, bold text. Provides authority and trust.

accent.name: Academy Gold
accent.usage: Use strictly as a 10-15% accent. Badges, CTA hover states, thin borders, hover underlines. Do not overuse to avoid visual noise.

glassmorphism.strategy: The 'Crystal' Variant. Use for the sticky header, floating action buttons, and feature cards over images.

borders.strategy: 1px delicate borders (border-slate-100 or border-gold/20) rather than heavy outlines to maintain the premium feel.

layouts.spacing: Generous. Use p-8 to p-12 inside sections. Section margins should be py-24.
layouts.hero: Split layout or Full width with a heavy overlay. Since background is white, use the primary navy as the hero background OR a high-quality classroom image with bg-navy/80 overlay. Tagline: 'Learn Today. Lead Tomorrow.'
layouts.courses_grid: Bento-style or 3-column auto-fit grid. Use glassmorphism cards if the background has a subtle texture, otherwise crisp white cards with a navy hover state.
layouts.why_choose_us: Asymmetric Bento Grid (TETRIS MODE). Mix square and tall cards.
layouts.floating_dock: Fixed bottom-right corner for AI Chat Assistant, WhatsApp button, and Call button. Stack them vertically with a staggered entrance animation.

motion.hero: Fade up with Framer Motion (y: 20 -> 0, opacity: 0 -> 1) staggered by 0.2s.
motion.scroll_reveal: Use whileInView to fade up sections as the user scrolls. Do not over-animate text, animate the container.
motion.hover_buttons: Scale up slightly (scale-105), background shifts from Navy to Gold, text shifts to black.
motion.floating_cards: Subtle float animation (y: [-5, 5, -5]) for the AI chat widget or hero floating elements.
motion.image_zoom: overflow-hidden on container, scale-110 on the img during hover.

components_needed: HeroSection (Banner with CTAs: Explore Courses / Online Admission / Contact)
CourseGrid (Cards with image, En/Te descriptions, hover zoom)
AdmissionForm (Shadcn forms, Input, Select, File Upload for Photo)
FloatingWidgets (AI Chatbot Popover, WhatsApp Link, Call Link)
AdminPanel (Mocked dashboard for owner to edit content/contacts)
GallerySection (Masonry or Grid layout of academy photos)

hero_banner.description: Students focused on learning in a modern computer lab setting.

course_typing.description: Close-up of hands typing on a black laptop keyboard.

course_accounting_tally.description: Graphs of performance analytics on a laptop screen.

course_ai_tools.description: A computer circuit board with an artificial intelligence brain concept.

course_career_skills.description: Young confident student holding a book in a library setting.

course_computer_basics.description: Children and students engaged in educational activities in a computer lab.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install required fonts: Font families `Outfit`, `DM Sans`, and `Noto Sans Telugu` must be imported via Google Fonts in index.css.
Language State: Implement a global context or simple React state to toggle between 'en' and 'te'. Content arrays should look like `{ en: 'Title', te: 'శీర్షిక' }`.
Bilingual layout handling: Telugu text requires slightly more vertical space. Do not use strict fixed heights (like h-32) on text containers. Use min-h-32 or h-full.
Implement the 'Crystal' Glassmorphism style exactly as defined for floating widgets and navbars.
Form Implementation: Use Shadcn UI for the Admission Form. Include a mocked photo upload zone.
Admin Panel: Build a distinct route or mocked conditional render for the Admin Dashboard showing editable tables of contacts/admissions. No real backend needed, just the UI.
Icons: Use `lucide-react` for standard UI, but use `@phosphor-icons/react` or `react-icons` if you need brand logos (like WhatsApp).
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Break the mold: use asymmetrical grids, overlap elements slightly, and rely heavily on z-index depth.
Do not use dark colors as simple gradients. Use solid Navy with Gold accents.
Never center align paragraph text. Keep dense content left-aligned for natural reading.
Ensure all interactive elements have `data-testid` attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
Never use AI assistant emoji characters (🤖🧠💭💡) for icons. Use real SVG icons.
Missing images? Use the specific Unsplash/Pexels URLs provided in this file. NEVER use placeholder text or dummyimage.com.
